description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized bull standing on a rectangular base, rendered with realistic anatomical details and a dynamic posture. The bull's head is slightly lowered, with one horn pointing forward and the other curving upward, giving it a sense of alertness and strength. The musculature and contours of the body are carefully sculpted, with visible folds and definition along the flanks and legs. The tail is slightly raised and curves naturally, while the hooves are firmly planted on the base. The surface has a weathered, patinated finish, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The overall impression is one of power and presence, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: A life-sized, realistic bronze bull sculpture with detailed musculature and a dynamic, alert posture, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the bull's lowered head, forward-pointing horn, and strong chest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the bull's body, muscular flanks, and the curve of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the back, tail, and hind legs, with both horns visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bull's head turned slightly, the upward-curving horn, and the stance of the legs.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible, but the sculpture is mounted on a base suitable for outdoor urban or park installation.
